datasets.name: ds_latest_predictions
queryLines: SELECT model_name, department, target_metric, forecast_horizon_hours, target_hour, ROUND(predicted_value, 1) AS predicted_value, ROUND(prediction_lower_bound, 1) AS lower_bound, ROUND(prediction_upper_bound, 1) AS upper_bound, ROUND(confidence_level * 100, 0) AS confidence_pct, ROUND(actual_value, 1) AS actual_value, ROUND(absolute_error, 2) AS error, forecast_generated_at FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_forecast_predictions WHERE forecast_generated_at = (SELECT MAX(forecast_generated_at) FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_forecast_predictions) ORDER BY department, target_metric, forecast_horizon_hours

datasets.name: ds_ed_predictions
queryLines: SELECT target_metric, forecast_horizon_hours, ROUND(predicted_value, 1) AS predicted_value, ROUND(prediction_lower_bound, 1) AS lower_bound, ROUND(prediction_upper_bound, 1) AS upper_bound, ROUND(confidence_level * 100, 0) AS confidence_pct, ROUND(actual_value, 1) AS actual_value, ROUND(absolute_error, 2) AS error FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_forecast_predictions WHERE department = 'ED' AND forecast_generated_at = (SELECT MAX(forecast_generated_at) FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_forecast_predictions) ORDER BY target_metric, forecast_horizon_hours

datasets.name: ds_icu_predictions
queryLines: SELECT target_metric, forecast_horizon_hours, ROUND(predicted_value, 1) AS predicted_value, ROUND(prediction_lower_bound, 1) AS lower_bound, ROUND(prediction_upper_bound, 1) AS upper_bound, ROUND(confidence_level * 100, 0) AS confidence_pct, ROUND(actual_value, 1) AS actual_value, ROUND(absolute_error, 2) AS error FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_forecast_predictions WHERE department = 'ICU' AND forecast_generated_at = (SELECT MAX(forecast_generated_at) FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_forecast_predictions) ORDER BY target_metric, forecast_horizon_hours

datasets.name: ds_predictions_7d
queryLines: SELECT model_name, department, target_metric, forecast_horizon_hours, target_hour, ROUND(predicted_value, 1) AS predicted_value, ROUND(prediction_lower_bound, 1) AS lower_bound, ROUND(prediction_upper_bound, 1) AS upper_bound, ROUND(actual_value, 1) AS actual_value, ROUND(absolute_error, 2) AS error FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_forecast_predictions ORDER BY target_hour DESC LIMIT 500

datasets.name: ds_pred_vs_actual
queryLines: SELECT model_name, department, target_metric, forecast_horizon_hours, target_hour, ROUND(predicted_value, 1) AS predicted_value, ROUND(actual_value, 1) AS actual_value, ROUND(absolute_error, 2) AS absolute_error FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_forecast_predictions WHERE actual_value IS NOT NULL ORDER BY target_hour DESC LIMIT 500

datasets.name: ds_pred_timeline_ed_arrivals
queryLines: SELECT target_hour, ROUND(predicted_value, 1) AS predicted_value, ROUND(prediction_lower_bound, 1) AS lower_bound, ROUND(prediction_upper_bound, 1) AS upper_bound, ROUND(actual_value, 1) AS actual_value FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_forecast_predictions WHERE department = 'ED' AND target_metric = 'arrivals' AND forecast_horizon_hours = 1 ORDER BY target_hour DESC LIMIT 200

datasets.name: ds_pred_timeline_icu_arrivals
queryLines: SELECT target_hour, ROUND(predicted_value, 1) AS predicted_value, ROUND(prediction_lower_bound, 1) AS lower_bound, ROUND(prediction_upper_bound, 1) AS upper_bound, ROUND(actual_value, 1) AS actual_value FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_forecast_predictions WHERE department = 'ICU' AND target_metric = 'arrivals' AND forecast_horizon_hours = 1 ORDER BY target_hour DESC LIMIT 200

datasets.name: ds_forecast_accuracy
queryLines: SELECT prediction_date, model_name, model_version, department, target_metric, forecast_horizon_hours, prediction_count, ROUND(mae, 3) AS mae, ROUND(mape, 1) AS mape, ROUND(coverage_pct, 1) AS coverage_pct FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_forecast_accuracy ORDER BY prediction_date DESC

datasets.name: ds_accuracy_summary
queryLines: SELECT model_name, department, target_metric, forecast_horizon_hours, COUNT(*) AS total_periods, ROUND(AVG(mae), 2) AS avg_mae, ROUND(AVG(mape), 1) AS avg_mape_pct, ROUND(AVG(coverage_pct), 1) AS avg_coverage_pct, SUM(prediction_count) AS total_predictions FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_forecast_accuracy GROUP BY model_name, department, target_metric, forecast_horizon_hours ORDER BY model_name, forecast_horizon_hours

datasets.name: ds_models_tracked
queryLines: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT model_name) AS models_tracked FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_forecast_accuracy

datasets.name: ds_overall_mae
queryLines: SELECT ROUND(AVG(mae), 2) AS overall_mae FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_forecast_accuracy

datasets.name: ds_overall_mape
queryLines: SELECT ROUND(AVG(mape), 1) AS overall_mape FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_forecast_accuracy WHERE mape IS NOT NULL

datasets.name: ds_mae_by_model_horizon
queryLines: SELECT model_name, CAST(forecast_horizon_hours AS STRING) AS horizon, ROUND(AVG(mae), 2) AS avg_mae FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_forecast_accuracy GROUP BY model_name, forecast_horizon_hours ORDER BY model_name, forecast_horizon_hours

datasets.name: ds_coverage_by_dept
queryLines: SELECT model_name, department, ROUND(AVG(coverage_pct), 1) AS avg_coverage_pct FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_forecast_accuracy GROUP BY model_name, department ORDER BY model_name

datasets.name: ds_accuracy_mae_trend
queryLines: SELECT prediction_date, model_name, ROUND(AVG(mae), 3) AS avg_mae FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_forecast_accuracy GROUP BY prediction_date, model_name ORDER BY prediction_date

datasets.name: ds_accuracy_mape_trend
queryLines: SELECT prediction_date, model_name, ROUND(AVG(mape), 1) AS avg_mape FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_forecast_accuracy WHERE mape IS NOT NULL GROUP BY prediction_date, model_name ORDER BY prediction_date

datasets.name: ds_model_comparison
queryLines: SELECT model_name, department, ROUND(AVG(mae), 2) AS avg_mae, ROUND(AVG(mape), 1) AS avg_mape_pct, SUM(prediction_count) AS total_predictions, ROUND(AVG(coverage_pct), 1) AS avg_coverage_pct FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_forecast_accuracy GROUP BY model_name, department ORDER BY model_name

datasets.name: ds_model_metadata
queryLines: SELECT model_name, model_version, ROUND(rmse, 3) AS rmse, ROUND(r2_score, 3) AS r2_score, ROUND(mae, 3) AS mae, best_trial_description, training_timestamp FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_model_training_metadata ORDER BY model_name

datasets.name: ds_patient_counts
queryLines: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_patients, COUNT(DISTINCT address_state) AS states_represented, COUNT(DISTINCT source_system) AS source_systems FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_patient_dim

datasets.name: ds_patient_sex
queryLines: SELECT sex, COUNT(*) AS patient_count FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_patient_dim GROUP BY sex ORDER BY patient_count DESC

datasets.name: ds_top_diagnoses
queryLines: SELECT diagnosis_code, diagnosis_description, diagnosis_coding_system, COUNT(*) AS diagnosis_count, COUNT(DISTINCT patient_id) AS unique_patients FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_diagnosis_fact WHERE diagnosis_code IS NOT NULL AND diagnosis_code != '' GROUP BY diagnosis_code, diagnosis_description, diagnosis_coding_system ORDER BY diagnosis_count DESC LIMIT 20

datasets.name: ds_observation_summary
queryLines: SELECT observation_id, observation_text, value_type, COUNT(*) AS obs_count, SUM(CASE WHEN is_abnormal THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS abnormal_count, ROUND(AVG(observation_value_numeric), 2) AS avg_value, ROUND(MIN(observation_value_numeric), 2) AS min_value, ROUND(MAX(observation_value_numeric), 2) AS max_value FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_observation_fact WHERE observation_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY observation_id, observation_text, value_type ORDER BY obs_count DESC LIMIT 20

datasets.name: ds_abnormal_flags
queryLines: SELECT abnormal_flags, COUNT(*) AS flag_count FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_observation_fact WHERE abnormal_flags IS NOT NULL AND abnormal_flags != '' GROUP BY abnormal_flags ORDER BY flag_count DESC

datasets.name: ds_allergy_overview
queryLines: SELECT allergen_description, allergen_type_text, severity_text, is_severe, COUNT(*) AS allergy_count, COUNT(DISTINCT patient_id) AS unique_patients FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_allergy_fact WHERE allergen_description IS NOT NULL GROUP BY allergen_description, allergen_type_text, severity_text, is_severe ORDER BY allergy_count DESC LIMIT 20

datasets.name: ds_allergy_severity
queryLines: SELECT COALESCE(severity_text, 'Unknown') AS severity, is_severe, COUNT(*) AS allergy_count FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_allergy_fact GROUP BY severity_text, is_severe ORDER BY allergy_count DESC

datasets.name: ds_order_activity
queryLines: SELECT universal_service_text, priority, result_status, COUNT(*) AS order_count, COUNT(DISTINCT patient_id) AS unique_patients FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_order_fact WHERE universal_service_text IS NOT NULL GROUP BY universal_service_text, priority, result_status ORDER BY order_count DESC LIMIT 20

datasets.name: ds_order_by_priority
queryLines: SELECT priority, COUNT(*) AS order_count, COUNT(DISTINCT patient_id) AS unique_patients FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_order_fact GROUP BY priority ORDER BY order_count DESC

datasets.name: ds_order_providers
queryLines: SELECT ordering_provider_name, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_order_fact WHERE ordering_provider_name IS NOT NULL AND ordering_provider_name != '' GROUP BY ordering_provider_name ORDER BY order_count DESC LIMIT 15

datasets.name: ds_total_patients
queryLines: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_patients FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_patient_dim

datasets.name: ds_total_diagnoses
queryLines: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_diagnoses FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_diagnosis_fact

datasets.name: ds_total_observations
queryLines: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_observations FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_observation_fact

datasets.name: ds_total_orders
queryLines: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_orders FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_order_fact

datasets.name: ds_total_allergies
queryLines: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_allergies FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_allergy_fact

datasets.name: ds_age_distribution
queryLines: SELECT CASE WHEN age < 18 THEN '0-17' WHEN age BETWEEN 18 AND 30 THEN '18-30' WHEN age BETWEEN 31 AND 45 THEN '31-45' WHEN age BETWEEN 46 AND 60 THEN '46-60' WHEN age BETWEEN 61 AND 75 THEN '61-75' ELSE '76+' END AS age_group, COUNT(*) AS patient_count FROM (SELECT FLOOR(DATEDIFF(CURRENT_DATE(), TO_DATE(date_of_birth, 'yyyyMMdd')) / 365.25) AS age FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_patient_dim WHERE date_of_birth IS NOT NULL) GROUP BY age_group ORDER BY age_group

datasets.name: ds_patient_city
queryLines: SELECT address_city AS city, COUNT(*) AS patient_count FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_patient_dim WHERE address_city IS NOT NULL GROUP BY address_city ORDER BY patient_count DESC LIMIT 10

Accuracy metrics, MAE/MAPE trends, model comparison, coverage analysis. Mirrors **App Page 4: Model Performance**.

frame.title: Average MAE by Model & Forecast Horizon
